title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Securities - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Securities - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!
